eas_text: A civil authority has issued A FIRE WARNING for the following counties or areas: Lincoln, NM; at 03:18 PM ON MAY 16, 2026 Effective until 03:18 PM MAY 17, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: AREAS NORTH SIDE OF CAPITANS BETWEEN GAP RD AND BOY SCOUT NEED TO EVACUATE DUE TO INCREASE FIRE DANGER. IF YOU NEED ASSISTANCE CALL 575-648-2341
